title: Pretty In Pink
description: Pretty In Pink is a Create addon that adds a huge variety of steel blocks in a multitude of colors. This mod ensures your building options are limitless.
body:
## Pretty In Pink:

**Pretty in pink aims to add many different types of blocks with a multitude of colors to choose from, with pretty in pink, building can become even more limitless**

**Artist: pinkmachine**
___

This mod currently adds 24 different colors to choose from, and 7 different types of blocks to choose from.

Blocks:
- Brushed Steel Hulls
- Steel Hulls
- Brushed Steel
- Steel Blocks
- Steel Boilers
- Steel Tanks
- Corrugated Steel Blocks

Colors:
- Pink
- Magenta
- Maroon
- Red
- Orange
- Vermilion
- Yellow
- Pine Green
- Olive
- Green
- Lime
- Chartreuse
- Sea Green
- Turquoise
- Light Blue
- Blue
- Royal Blue
- Purple
- Brown
- White
- Light Gray
- Gray
- Black

Hulls:
Hulls can be offset by half a block when shift placing them:
![Hull Offset](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7cf3d9c42e221a789c22ed36664543ca22f50d4d.png)

This mod is an addon to the [Create Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/create), and supports Create 6.0+ on NeoForge 1.21.1
